title: Horoscope
text:
## Today's Horoscope

**Sign:** {adjective} signs

**Opportunity:** A {adjective} stranger may offer you a {adjective} opportunity near a {place}.

**Lucky charm:** Your lucky {object} is hiding inside an old {object}.

**Romance:** Romance blooms when you {verb} with confidence and wear something {adjective}.

**Warning:** Beware of {adjective} advice from a {adjective} relative.

**Finance:** Financial luck arrives after you {verb} a forgotten {object}.

**Tonight:** Dream of {plural noun} animals and wake up feeling {adjective}.
